query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS invoices (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  invoiceNumber VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  investmentId INT NULL,
  propertyId INT NOT NULL,
  amount INT NOT NULL,
  shares INT NOT NULL,
  sharePrice INT NOT NULL,
  currency ENUM('USD', 'EGP') DEFAULT 'USD' NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'paid', 'cancelled', 'expired') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  issueDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  dueDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  paidAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  paymentMethod VARCHAR(50),
  transactionId VARCHAR(255),
  notes TEXT,
  pdfUrl TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX user_id_idx (userId),
  INDEX status_idx (status),
  INDEX investment_id_idx (investmentId),
  FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (investmentId) REFERENCES investments(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (propertyId) REFERENCES properties(id)
)

  dueDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  paidAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  paymentMethod VARCHAR(50),
  transactionId VARCHAR(255),
  notes TEXT,
  pdfUrl TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX user_id_idx (userId),
  INDEX status_idx (status),
  INDEX investment_id_idx (investmentId),
  FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (investmentId) REFERENCES investments(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (propertyId) REFERENCES properties(id)
)
